title: Merge origin/main into feature/tactus-procedure and verify report behavior
description: Stash local changes, merge origin/main with merge commit, reapply stash, run targeted tests and report CLI smoke checks, push branch, and verify GitHub Actions CI passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: will stash local state, fetch/prune remotes, merge origin/main into feature/tactus-procedure, reapply stash, run focused report tests/smoke checks, push, and verify GitHub Actions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Merge completed with conflicts in .gitignore and project/.cache/index.json (resolved by keeping both ignore entries and taking main-side cache file). Verified merged behavior in code: service.py now defaults missing optional params to empty string before Jinja render; feedback_analysis.py accepts score_id and score from config/params. Ran targeted tests: pytest -q plexus/reports/tests/test_parameter_utils.py plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis_test.py (39 passed). Ran CLI smoke checks for report config e555be4d-8013-419f-bb63-87b348712944: (1) empty score via --param-score= rendered and completed successfully (Report ID 4b17a74a-c02a-4aa1-b3ea-b5845a7a80e9), (2) explicit score via --param-score=44246 resolved and used score filter path (Report ID 2d2730e9-a0ee-43d9-80bb-3efb373198f9). Proceeding to push and CI verification.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up from CI failure: reproduced failing tests in .claude/skills/plexus-guidelines/validate_guidelines_test.py and updated binary fixtures/assertions to include required 'Conditions for No' section. Local verification: pytest -q .claude/skills/plexus-guidelines/validate_guidelines_test.py (32 passed) and combined targeted suite pytest -q plexus/reports/tests/test_parameter_utils.py plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis_test.py .claude/skills/plexus-guidelines/validate_guidelines_test.py (71 passed). Next: commit, push, and wait for GitHub Actions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Final verification complete. Commit ef4366fc aligned validator tests with required binary section 'Conditions for No'. Local tests passed (71 targeted). GitHub Actions run 23016477402 on feature/tactus-procedure completed SUCCESS at 2026-03-12T18:09:13Z (Dashboard Unit Tests, Dashboard Storybook Tests, Python 3.11, Python 3.12 all green).
